description: A square graphic over a soft-focus photograph of a waving U.S. flag. Blue italic text gives a quotation reading USCIS is proud to welcome new citizens who made the right choice to lawfully immigrate, assimilate, and contribute to America's greatness. Taking the Oath of Allegiance and embracing U.S. citizenship is a remarkable act of patriotism.
notable_text: USCIS is proud to welcome new citizens who made the right choice to lawfully immigrate, assimilate, and contribute to America's greatness. Taking the Oath of Allegiance and embracing U.S. citizenship is a remarkable act of patriotism.
